body.title: Wire default channels: Shared, per-agent auto-create, web UI integration
body.result: CommsModule wired into UC server. comms://shared on startup, auto-create comms://<agent_id> on register. /api/comms/channels + /api/comms/health endpoints. Postgres transport with memory fallback. 12 tests.
body.description:
After T-uc-comms-module is built, wire up the default channel set.

## Default channels
- comms://shared — always-on broadcast channel, all agents see it, notify off by default
- comms://ccmain — auto-created on CC connect, notify on, private to CC + Akien
- comms://igor-wild-0001 — auto-created on Igor connect, notify on, private to Igor + Akien
- comms://log/main — write-only operational log channel

## Web UI integration
- Tab bar reads channel list from CommsModule
- Tab per channel with notification checkbox bound to channel.notify
- Shared tab always visible
- Agent tabs appear/disappear on connect/disconnect
- Color change blue→green on new messages for Akien

## Hook integration
- CC UserPromptSubmit hook checks comms://ccmain (and comms://shared if notify checked)
- Igor polls comms://igor-wild-0001 via MCP channel_read

## Depends on
- T-uc-comms-module
- T-uc-channel-tabs-redesign (web UI side)
